Metadata.title: LinkableWork | Partner Portal for Construction Recruitment
Metadata.description: We recruit both companies and individuals for construction assignments across Sweden. Apply as a subcontractor, company, work crew, or individual — we match you with the right project or employment.
Metadata.ogDescription: Find construction projects or employment across Sweden. Apply as a company, subcontractor, or individual.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Find construction projects or employment across Sweden.

RequestJob.title: Need a Job Done?
RequestJob.description: Whether you're a homeowner needing a deck, pool, or renovation — or a company with a larger construction need. Describe what you need and we'll get back to you with a quote.

vetted.title: Vetted Contractors
vetted.description: All our partners hold valid certifications, ID06, and liability insurance. Peace of mind from the start.

offer.title: Free Quote
offer.description: Describe your needs and receive a no-obligation quote. No hidden fees — just clear pricing.

scope.title: Small Jobs to Large Projects
scope.description: From pool excavation and foundations to major infrastructure projects. We find the right contractor for every job.

form.title: Tell Us About Your Project
form.description: Fill in the form and we'll contact you with a quote.
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us as much as possible about what needs to be done...
form.successDescription: We will get back to you with a quote within 24 hours.
form.error: Could not send. Please try again.

RequestWorkers.title: Need Workers?
RequestWorkers.description: Do you have a project that lacks competent hands? We supply skilled workers and work teams to your site. We can also upload your project to our portal to find the perfect match.

supply.title: We Supply Labor
supply.description: Whether you need a single machine operator or a full team of 20, we arrange it quickly and securely.

portal.title: Upload to Portal
portal.description: Reach thousands of verified subcontractors and skilled workers by uploading your project to our platform.

vetted.title: Vetted Competence
vetted.description: All our workers have valid certificates like ID06, Safe Construction, and APV. We handle all verification.

form.title: Upload Your Project
form.description: Tell us a bit about what you need, and we'll contact you to find the right solution.
form.successDescription: We will review your needs and get back to you as soon as possible.

Hero.description: LinkableWork connects private individuals, employees, skilled subcontractors, machine operators, and work teams with construction projects across Sweden. Register once, get matched instantly.

recruiting.title: Currently Recruiting
recruiting.scroll: Scroll down to see all open positions

Projects.title: Find the right project for your skills
Projects.description: We are actively recruiting across Sweden for groundworks, infrastructure, and specialized construction roles. Browse current openings and apply in minutes.
Projects.detailSubtitle: Here you will find detailed information about the project and how to apply.
Projects.rolesSubtitle: We are looking for reinforcement in the following categories:
Projects.machineNote: Please specify in your application which machines you have experience with and which operator licenses you hold.
Projects.machineListDesc: For machine operators, we are primarily looking for experience with:
Projects.languageReq: Language: Swedish or good English in the crew. At least one person per crew must be able to communicate fluently in Swedish for safety briefings.
Projects.tools: Tools: Subcontractors are expected to supply their own hand tools and personal protective equipment (PPE).
Projects.insurance: Insurance: Valid liability insurance is required for all subcontractors.
Projects.paymentTerms: Payment terms: 30 days after approved invoice
Projects.compensationType: Compensation: Hourly rate according to agreement or fixed price on sub-contract
Projects.ftaxReq: F-tax: Required for all applying companies and sole proprietors.
Projects.checklistReferences: Brief description of similar previous projects (references)
Projects.id06Note: ID06 can be arranged by LinkableWork upon employment

groundworks.title: Groundworks
groundworks.description: Foundation work, excavation, and site preparation for new residential and commercial developments across Norrbotten and Vasterbotten. Immediate starts available for crews with valid ID06 and APV certification.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Road construction, utilities installation, and civil infrastructure projects across Sweden. Looking for experienced teams with safe construction training and machine operator licenses.

specialized.title: Specialized Machine Work
specialized.description: Skilled machine operators needed for grading, paving, and heavy earthmoving operations. Valid Maskinforarbevis and Arbete pa vag (APV) certification required. Competitive hourly rates.

building.title: Building & Construction
building.description: General construction crews needed for residential building projects from foundation to finishing. F-tax status required for individual applicants. Teams of 3-8 preferred.

umea-centrum.title: Umea City Centre Development
umea-centrum.description: Mixed-use development in central Umea with commercial and residential units. Foundation work, concrete structures, and interior finishing phases. Experienced teams with ID06 and safe construction training preferred.

lulea-hamn.title: Lulea Harbour Expansion
lulea-hamn.description: Expansion of Lulea harbour facilities including new quay, cargo handling areas, and rail connection. Heavy earthmoving, piling, and asphalt work. Machine operators with APV certification needed.

skelleftea-campus.title: Skelleftea Campus Area
skelleftea-campus.description: New educational buildings and surrounding infrastructure at Skelleftea campus. Groundworks, foundation laying, and site preparation for Phase 1 construction starting immediately.

pitea-industri.title: Pitea Industrial Park
pitea-industri.description: Industrial park development on the outskirts of Pitea. New road networks, utility installation, and commercial building foundations. Ideal for teams with experience in infrastructure and site development.

HowItWorks.title: Three ways to use LinkableWork
HowItWorks.description: Whether you're looking for work, need workers, or want a job done — we have a process for you.

titles.worker: Four steps to your next project
titles.company: Four steps to the right workers
titles.client: Four steps to getting it done

descriptions.worker: Our streamlined process is designed for construction professionals. Apply from your phone between tasks, no paperwork required.
descriptions.company: Find qualified workers and crews for your project. We handle the entire process from posting to onboarding.
descriptions.client: Describe what needs to be done — from pools and decks to larger construction projects — and we'll get back to you with a quote.

apply.title: Apply to Project
apply.description: Browse open positions and apply directly to the projects that match your skills and preferences. Our streamlined application form captures all the information recruiters need — roles, certifications, experience — so you can apply in minutes from your phone.

upload.title: Upload Credentials
upload.description: Securely upload your mandatory certifications — ID06, Safe Construction, APV (Arbete pa vag), and Maskinforarbevis. Don't have ID06? We can arrange it for you upon employment.

match.title: Get Matched
match.description: Our team reviews your application or profile and matches you with active projects based on your location preferences, certifications, and availability. High-match applicants receive instant notifications via email, ensuring you never miss the right opportunity.

profile.title: Register Your Profile (coming soon)
profile.description: Create your partner account in under 5 minutes. Tell us about your company or individual F-tax status, primary roles, specializations, and team capacity. The form is designed for quick completion even on mobile devices at the construction site.

post.title: Post Your Need
post.description: Upload your project or describe the workers you need — numbers, roles, certification requirements, and desired start period. We help you craft the listing for the best match.

review.title: Review Candidates
review.description: Our team screens and matches qualified candidates against your requirements. You receive a curated list of verified workers and subcontractors ready for interview.

hire.title: Select & Hire
hire.description: Choose the candidates that fit best. We handle contracts, ID06 registration, and all administration so you can get started quickly.

start.title: Start the Work
start.description: The workers are on site according to the agreed schedule. We follow up throughout the project to ensure everything runs smoothly.

describe.title: Describe Your Project
describe.description: Tell us what needs to be done — whether it's a pool, deck, foundation, or larger contract. Specify location, budget, and desired timeline.

quote.title: Get a Quote
quote.description: We review your project and get back to you with a free, no-obligation quote within 24 hours. Clear pricing with no hidden fees.

approve.title: Approve & Book
approve.description: Happy with the quote? Approve and we'll schedule the start date and coordinate all necessary resources, certifications, and equipment.

done.title: Work Gets Done
done.description: Our verified contractors carry out the work as agreed. We're there as support throughout the entire process.

Why.title: Why businesses, workers, and clients choose us
Why.description: No matter who you are — we make the construction process smoother, faster, and safer.

worker.title: The smarter way to find construction work
worker.description: We eliminate the friction between skilled workers and the projects that need them. Here is what sets us apart from traditional recruitment.

matching.title: Fast Matching
matching.description: Our recruiters review applications within 24 hours. High-match candidates with in-demand certifications like APV and Machine Operator licenses are prioritized and contacted immediately.

location.title: Projects Across Sweden
location.description: From Lulea to Goteborg, we partner with major construction firms to bring you projects in your preferred region. Specify your geographic preferences and willingness to travel during onboarding.

secure.title: Secure & Compliant
secure.description: All uploaded documents are encrypted and stored securely. We handle F-tax verification, ID06 checks, and certification validation so you can focus on the work that matters.

teams.title: Built for Teams & Individuals
teams.description: Whether you are a large subcontractor, a small company, or an individual with F-tax status, our portal adapts to your profile. Register as a crew of 20 or a solo specialist.

transparent.title: Transparent Requirements
transparent.description: Every project listing clearly states required certifications, role expectations, and duration. No surprises — you know exactly what is needed before you apply.

mobile.title: Construction-First Design
mobile.description: Our portal is built mobile-first because we know you are often on-site. The application form works seamlessly on any smartphone, tablet, or desktop browser.

company.title: Hire qualified construction workers — fast and easy
company.description: We make it easy for companies to find verified workers, whether you need a single machine operator or an entire crew.

speed.title: Workers Within 48 Hours
speed.description: Need staff quickly? Our process from posting to matching usually takes less than two days. We pre-screen all candidates.

vetted.title: Verified Workers
vetted.description: All candidates are pre-vetted with valid ID06, certifications, and F-tax status. No admin — just ready to start.

flexible.title: Flexible Staffing
flexible.description: Hire by the hour, by the project, or long-term. Scale up or down as needed. No long notice periods.

support.title: Dedicated Contact
support.description: You get a personal recruitment manager who knows your company and needs. The same contact every time.

quality.title: Quality-Assured Matching
quality.description: We match on more than just skills — we consider personality, work culture, and past experience for the best results.

network.title: Large Network
network.description: Access to thousands of pre-vetted workers, machine operators, and subcontractors across Sweden.

client.title: Get a quote for your construction project — no obligation
client.description: Whether you're a homeowner or a business, we help you find the right contractor for the job.

freeQuote.title: Free Quote
freeQuote.description: Describe what you need and get a free, no-obligation quote within 24 hours. No hidden fees — just clear pricing.

vetted.title: Vetted Contractors
vetted.description: All our contractors hold valid certifications, ID06, and liability insurance. Peace of mind from day one.

allSizes.title: Small Jobs to Large Projects
allSizes.description: From pool digging and deck building to major contracts and infrastructure projects. No job is too small or too large.

support.title: Support Throughout
support.description: We're with you from quote to completed result. Have questions or issues? Contact us and we'll sort it out.

insurance.title: Insured Peace of Mind
insurance.description: All contractors have liability insurance and we verify ID06 and certifications. You're safe from start to finish.

timely.title: Timely Service
timely.description: We get back with a quote within 24 hours and work starts according to the agreed schedule — punctual and professional.

Certs.title: Certifications We Verify
Certs.description: Upload your certifications during onboarding — we handle validation

Guide.title: Guide: Swedish Professional Certificates & Trade Licenses
Guide.description: An overview of the most common professional certificates and licenses in the Swedish construction and civil engineering industry, organized by category and issuing body.
Guide.tip: When applying via LinkableWork you can upload digital copies of your trade certificates and licenses directly in the portal. Have a certificate number from BYN or TYA? Include it in your application for faster verification.

byn.title: 1. BYN & Other Trade Boards
byn.subtitle: These usually require completed apprenticeship and a passed theoretical exam.

tra.title: Wood, Concrete, Masonry & Interior
items: Carpenter: Trade certificate for house building and wood construction.
Concrete Worker: Includes casting, reinforcement and grinding.
Mason: Trade certificate for bricklaying and plastering.
Tiler: Trade certificate for wall and floor tiles.
Floor Layer: Trade certificate for flooring, parquet and grinding.
Roof Fitter: Specialist in waterproofing and roof materials.
Painter (MYN): Trade certificate for interior and exterior painting.

plåt.title: Sheet Metal & Ventilation (PVF)
items: Construction Sheet Metal Worker: Roof and facade sheet metal work.
Ventilation Sheet Metal Worker: Manufacturing and installation of ventilation systems.

mark.title: Ground & Civil Works
items: Road and Civil Worker: Basic competence for infrastructure, pipe laying and site preparation.
Civil Engineering Diver: Specialist for heavy underwater work.
Stone Installer: Specialization in curbstones, paving stones.
Paving Worker: Asphalt work and surface layers.
Rock Worker: Drilling and blasting (often requires blasting certificate).
Landscape Gardener (TSY): Specialist in green areas and planting.

maskin.title: 2. Machine & Crane (BYN / TYA)
maskin.subtitle: Machine operators require specific trade certificates for each machine type.

grav.title: Excavation & Earthmoving
items: Excavator: Trade certificate for tracked and wheeled excavators.
Backhoe Loader: Combination machine for excavation and loading.
Trencher: For heavy trenching and terrain grading.
Motor Grader: Advanced machine for fine grading of road surfaces.
Dumper: For transporting materials in terrain.
Roller/Compactor: For compaction of soil, gravel or asphalt.

lyft.title: Lifting & Special Machines
items: Wheel Loader: Trade certificate for construction and material handling.
Telehandler: For high lifts and material handling.
Mobile Crane / Tower Crane: Requires extensive training and crane operator certificate.
Concrete Pump Operator: Machine for precision placement of concrete.
Asphalt Paver: Specialist machine for road paving.
Pile Driver / Sheet Piling Rig: Critical role for foundations.

installation.title: 3. Installation, Electrical & HVAC
installation.subtitle: These are often legal requirements or insurance company demands.

items: HVAC Fitter: Trade license via VVS-YN and 'Safe Water' authorization.
Electrician: Authorization via the Swedish Electrical Safety Authority.
Refrigeration & Heat Pump Technician (Incert): Required for work with refrigerants.
Alarm Technician (SSF): Certification for burglar alarms and security systems.
Insulation Fitter: Technical insulation of pipes and ventilation.
Ventilation Fitter: Often linked to OVK certification.
Welding Certificate (ISO 9606-1): Required for load-bearing steel structures.
Asbestos Remediation: Requires special training approved by the Work Environment Authority.
PCB Remediation: Specialist competence for hazardous waste handling.
Epoxy/Isocyanates: Training required for chemical risk work.
Scaffolder: Divided into levels — Special (over 9m), General (2–9m).
Core Driller: Specialists in drilling and sawing concrete.
Fire Protection Painter: Certification for applying fire-retardant paint.

certs.title: 5. Important Industry Certificates & Courses
certs.subtitle: These require regular renewal (usually every 5 years).

items: ID06: Mandatory ID system for construction sites.
Safe Construction Training: Online safety course.
Work on Road (APV): Levels 1.1–3 depending on responsibility and vehicle type.
Hot Works: Certificate for fire hazardous work.
BAS P / BAS U: Construction environment coordinator.
Mobile Work Platforms (Cherry Picker/Scissor Lift): Training per SS-ISO 18878.
Nail Gun: Training for powder-actuated tools.
CPR: Often with focus on construction sites.
Safe Lifting / Load Coupling: Required for all who attach loads to cranes.
ADR-S 1.3: Transport of dangerous goods.
Stockholm City Course: Required for work on city land.

drivers.title: 7. Driver's License Categories (Transportstyrelsen)
drivers.subtitle: For roles involving transport of materials, machines or personnel.

items: B: Car and light truck (basic requirement for most roles).
BE: Car with heavy trailer (common for installers with machine trailers).
C: Heavy truck (e.g. for dump trucks or crane trucks).
CE: Heavy truck with trailer (for heavy transport and logistics).
YKB (Professional competence certificate): Legal requirement for professional goods transport with C/CE license.
Digital tachograph card: Required for drivers of vehicles with tachographs.

rail.title: 6. Railway (Trafikverket)
rail.subtitle: Infrastructure projects related to railways require specific Trafikverket authorizations.

items: Protection and Safety Leader (SoS): Responsible for safety during track work.
Supervisor (TSM): Responsible for traffic safety.
BAS-P/U Railway: Specific focus on track environment.

CTA.title: Ready to get started?
CTA.description: Whether you are a private individual, employee, machine operator, subcontractor, or a work team looking for the next project — register today and let us connect you with opportunities across Sweden.

Form.title: Apply for projects or employment role
Form.description: LinkableWork is looking for new employees, subcontractors, companies, and individuals with F-tax for assignments in groundworks, construction, infrastructure, and contracting. Assignments run from May through October.
Form.name: Name
Form.cvHint: Paste your CV, describe your experience, or link to your LinkedIn profile
Form.cvPlaceholder: For example: 10+ years as excavator operator...
Form.referencesHint: Previous employers, projects, or clients we can contact
Form.extraCertificationsHint: List any certificates or trade licenses not in the options above
Form.extraCertificationsPlaceholder: e.g. Painter (MYN), HVAC fitter, Welding cert ISO 9606-1...
Form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your experience, team size, availability...
Form.successDescription: We will get back to you within 24 hours.
Form.error: Could not send application. Please try again.

Footer.description: Connecting skilled construction professionals with projects across Sweden. Fast, secure, and built for the industry.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions about recruitment, projects, or want to request a quote? Get in touch and we'll help you.
